response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and full-stack development, with relevant experience in build systems and CI/CD. However, his people-management experience is limited, and his background is more individual-contributor-focused, which may require assessment of leadership potential.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in software development, including developer tools, CI/CD, and testing frameworks (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial).
Proven track record in building and maintaining technical infrastructure (e.g., GitLab, CI servers, Kubernetes) and open-source projects.
Strong technical leadership in system design, architecture, and cross-functional collaboration (e.g., Stripe, Shopify, Altom Consulting).
concerns: Limited explicit people-management experience (only 1-2 years inferred from team leadership roles).
No direct mobile-platform expertise mentioned, though experience with embedded systems and real-time data may translate.
Lack of formal education in computer science (Bachelor's in Photography/Video alongside CS degree).
